title: lychnis laciniata
intro: Lychnis laciniata, also known as the cut-leaved lychnis or mullein lychnis, is a flowering plant species belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lychnis laciniata include soothing coughs, treating skin conditions, and reducing fever. Lychnis laciniata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
